title: Ten Lives Datapack
description: A simple datapack that gives each player ten lives.
body:
The Ten Lives Datapack

If you think Minecraft Hardcore is a bit too much of a challenge for you and your friends we have just the right datapack for you. With our Datapack each player is given ten lives so that you and your friends have a higher chance of survival. Even if one of your friends does end up losing all of their lives don't worry because we have a system which allows you to save them. All you need is to craft a respawn item then give it to your friend -In Minecraft- and all they have to do is to right-click it. Then they will be back to ten lives.

The Features

-Ten Lives

-A Respawning System

-Custom Crafts

-Custom Drops*

-A Death Counter

Custom Crafts

 

Heart Fragment

Respawn Item

Player Heads

*The Players Now Drop Their Head
